items.title: Former Olympian indicted for allegedly vandalising Washington Reflecting Pool
items.dek: US authorities charged him with property destruction after renovations championed by President Donald Trump appeared to go awry.
items.body: US authorities charged him with property destruction after renovations championed by President Donald Trump appeared to go awry.

items.title: Killers of British couple in South Africa sentenced to life
items.dek: The pair had been collecting rare plants and seeds before their bodies were found days later in a river.
items.body: The pair had been collecting rare plants and seeds before their bodies were found days later in a river.
